attach-zugferd-xml.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A-3B
attach-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates embedding a ZUGFeRD XML file into a PDF using FileSpecification and converting the document to PDF/A-3B compliance.

create-zugferd-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF
create-zugferd-invoice.description: Demonstrates embedding a ZUGFeRD XML file into a PDF and converting it to PDF/A‑3B to produce a compliant invoice.

validate-zugferd-pdf.title: Validate ZUGFeRD PDF against PDF/A-3B and check embedded XML
validate-zugferd-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to validate a PDF containing ZUGFeRD data for PDF/A‑3B compliance and verify the presence of the embedded ZUGFeRD XML file.

extract-zugferd-xml.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates how to locate an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file in a PDF and save it as a separate XML file.

remove-zugferd-attachment.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to delete a ZUGFeRD XML attachment from a PDF while keeping the rest of the document intact.

encrypt-zugferd-pdf.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-zugferd-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding a ZUGFeRD XML into a PDF/A‑3B document and encrypting it with user and owner passwords.

add-document-expiry-javascript.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript Expiry Action
add-document-expiry-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to attach a document-level JavaScript that checks an expiry date and closes the PDF when the date has passed.

javascript-open-action-page-10.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
javascript-open-action-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action that moves the viewer to page 10 when the PDF is opened.

add-page-level-javascript.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF page that shows an alert when the page becomes visible.

add-document-level-javascript-auto-save.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript for Auto‑Save
add-document-level-javascript-auto-save.description: Demonstrates embedding a document‑level JavaScript that periodically saves the PDF file.

draw-star-low-level.title: Draw Custom Star Shape Using Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-star-low-level.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf low‑level operators to draw a star shape at given coordinates.

change-line-width.title: Change Line Width Operators from 1pt to 3pt
change-line-width.description: Loads a PDF, finds SetLineWidth operators with width 1 point and changes them to 3 points, then saves the document.

replace-text-showtext.title: Replace Text in PDF by Modifying ShowText Operators
replace-text-showtext.description: Demonstrates how to locate ShowText operators in a PDF, replace specific strings, and save the modified document.

line-graph-multi-stroke.title: Create Line Graph with Multiple Stroke Styles
line-graph-multi-stroke.description: Demonstrates how to draw a line graph with three data series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted) using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-vector-graphic-graph.title: Embed Vector Graphic Graph into PDF
embed-vector-graphic-graph.description: Creates a PDF page and embeds a vector graphic (graph) using Aspose.Pdf's Graph class, demonstrating how to add shapes as vector objects directly in the PDF.

combine-multiple-graphs.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page
combine-multiple-graphs.description: Creates a PDF with four graphs arranged in a 2x2 grid on one page.
